name: Simple Tree House
description: The wood has been treated to prevent decay. It'll do as a living space if you aren't picky.

name: Little Windmill House
description: A comfortable home with windmill blades that turn when the wind rises.

name: Tranquil Sanctuary
description: Close the door to enjoy a moment of peace and quiet.

name: Red Brick Mansion
description: The decor is certainly fancy, but its size makes cleanup a dreadful chore.

name: Fantastical Teapot
description: A large teapot that somebody left there. It actually looks quite nice once you clean it up.

name: Ocean Echoes
description: Its inhabitants often fall asleep to the soothing sound of waves.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Creamy Little House
description: The cute baby enjoys being surrounded by the smell of cream as it sleeps.

name: Dreamy Ivory Chateau
description: The dreamy drapes and sweet scent of flowers will transport you straight to your very own wonderland.

name: Nightmare Castle
description: A house that unexpectedly appeared in the depths of the forest. Would you like to enter?

name: Delicious Gingerbread House
description: What?! You clearly snuck a bite out of this!

name: Exquisite Tower
description: Despite its small size, the universe is contained within it.

name: Floral House
description: Enjoy a unique rustic lifestyle!

name: Melon Paradise
description: Hey, hey! This melon is not meant to be eaten!

name: Music Home
description: Unfamiliar tunes can be heard coming from inside at times.

name: Bellflower House
description: The best place to avoid the summer heat.

name: Sunken Boat
description: Despite its sunken state, this boat has still been exquisitely decorated.

name: Daylight Pavilion
description: Staying inside this house gives you a sense of confidence that you can master various instruments.

name: Sleepy Tent
description: Good night, sleep tight, may you have sweet dreams tonight.

name: Lavender Garden
description: I've planted a lavender garden that I'm carefully cultivating.

name: House of Stars
description: Who secretly wished for a house surrounded by flowers?

name: Fantasy House
description: It looks like it houses all the fun things in the world!

name: House of Time
description: If only time could slow down... just a bit more!

name: Peachy Trampoline
description: Every kid who sees this will want to bounce on it!

name: Blue Checkered Ball
description: Come and kick the ball!

name: Bread Skateboard
description: Can I skate and eat at the same time?

name: Lace-trimmed Pool
description: As a top-notch swimmer, I swim as much as I possibly can!

name: Cheesy Rocking Chair
description: The creaking sounds that it emits as it rocks back and forth cause one to reminisce about the good times.

name: Bread Ballad
description: Sing your favorite melody!

name: Fluffy Seesaw
description: The fluffiness of the bread gives it a unique bounciness.

name: Cheesy Table
description: Who secretly nibbled on the cheesecake that has been placed on the table?

name: Magic Chest
description: Open it for an unexpected surprise!

name: Talkative Witch's Hat
description: Although it says a lot of nonsense, it is rumored to be able to be able to predict the future.

name: Thorny Cage
description: As it is made from black iron, it is very sturdy.

name: Gurgling Pumpkin Soup
description: Want to try some? Who knows if there'll be some miraculous effect.

name: Echoing Melancholy
description: The intermittent creaking evokes a faint sadness.

name: Sad Ghost
description: It floats around aimlessly without direction.

name: Twinkling Halo
description: The faster you run, the brighter the halo.

name: Forest Drum
description: Da dum, da dum... It's the sound of the forest's whispers.

name: Tiny Jack-in-the-box
description: Something amazing will happen when you open it.

name: Relaxing Hot Air Balloon
description: Relax as you laze inside this hot air balloon and admire the surrounding view.

name: Rocking Sleigh
description: Remember to deliver presents to all of the little kids on time!

name: Cloud Somersault
description: So fast–it can travel long distances in but an instant!

name: Ink Desk
description: Don't sleep in class!

name: Light Shuttlecock
description: A light kick is enough to send it flying.

name: Three-Color Flower Ball
description: Come and see if you have a talent for juggling balls.

name: Auspicious Carp
description: Give it a shake and money will start flowing in from all directions.

name: Lively Drum
description: Boom, boom, boom! Move to the beat as you gather the nectar.

name: Toy Frying Pan
description: Safe and reliable, this is the perfect toy for kids to practice their cooking.

name: Budding Cart
description: La la la, I'm a hardworking little gardener.

name: Speedy Nectar-Gathering
description: I wonder where the flowers will pop up?

name: Cloud Shower
description: Take a shower to feel refreshed!

name: Rocking Cloud
description: Rock back and forth among the clouds until you drift to sleep. Sweet dreams!

name: Bouncy Pudding
description: Its bounciness is out of this world!

name: Baby Parfait
description: A necessity for babies to avoid the summer heat!

name: Vintage Cake
description: The handmade cream is fresh and not overly cloying.

name: Tame Shopping Cart
description: I'm going on a shopping spree today!

name: Chocolate Cosmetic Case
description: Come and try the latest cosmetics!

name: Lively Speaker
description: One... two... three... four... and repeat!

name: Wacky Popcorn
description: Cloud, forest, and star flavors... I want to try every one of them!

name: Mystery Mirror
description: It'll take you someplace you've never been before.

name: Rumble Spellbook
description: Go on and recite your spell loudly: Grumble rumble!

name: Pumpkin Go-Kart
description: Don't worry, this pumpkin is unbelievably resistant to breakages.

name: Ghoulish Balloons
description: Be careful when you walk past them.

name: Spot-on Fortunes
description: You only pay if its prediction happens.

name: Warm and Cozy Fireplace
description: You'll doze off before you know it.

name: Birdie Gift Box
description: A surprise for you!

name: Bell of Blessing
description: Each chime signifies the sincerest of blessings.

name: Powered Tiny Train
description: It's also full of power today!

name: Snowfall Bench
description: You never know what is the next piece of chocolate you will get.

name: Warm Coffee
description: Warms you up on this cold winter night.

name: Refined Slingshot
description: Made with care. Be careful not to harm others when using it.

name: Asiatic Apple Swing
description: Enjoy this moment as you sway among the petals.

name: Fortuitous Pinwheel
description: Spin it to receive good luck and prosperity.

name: Spinning Top
description: The ultimate prize of a spinning top competition.

name: Precise Pitch-pot
description: Aim with 100% accuracy!

name: Prosperous Lion Dance Head
description: Usher in good luck and prosperity!

name: Cooling Tub
description: A tingle of coolness in the midsummer.

name: Countryside Swing
description: Swingin' in the countryside.

name: Twisted Trumpet
description: It may twist and turn, but it never goes off-key.

name: Simple Balance Beam
description: Simple, but not easy!

name: Bouncy Mushroom
description: Surprisingly bouncy.

name: Delicious Food Processor
description: Who's hungry?

name: Acrobatic Unicycle
description: Time to put your cycling skills to the test.

name: No-frills Yoga Ball
description: Do some stretching to relax your body

name: Bath of Purity
description: Here, you can stripe off all pretenses and show off your natural self.

name: Swaying Swan
description: Rock-a-bye baby on the tree top...

name: Angel's Wings
description: Carries you to the distant skies.

name: Romantic Moment
description: Revisit that moment anytime you wish.

name: Twinkling Chimes
description: What delightfully melodious sounds these chimes make.

name: Tender Heart
description: My hearts thumps for you.

name: Dancing Cactus
description: Come dance along with Mister Cactus!

name: Snowscape Stage
description: Where little snowy stories unfold.

name: Squeaky Scales
description: Launches little birds into the air... Wait, why don't they already fly?

name: Fortune Stick Holder
description: This is the best of all fortunes!

name: Bird and Blooms
description: The charm of a bird chirping amidst flowers.

name: Cute Shadow Play Theater
description: What an exciting story!

name: Landscape Hot Spring
description: Relax in the water and enjoy the snowy scenery.

name: Auspicious Drum
description: Dum dum dum! Check out my dazzling dance moves.

name: Elegant Rocking Chair
description: Rocking back and forth... You might doze off before you know it.

name: Classic Log
description: The scent of nature.

name: Kitty Lattice
description: Cats with a British style.

name: Memories of Spring
description: Time waits for no one; give it your all.

name: Simple Elegance
description: A reserved, low-key look.

name: Reverie Blue
description: It'll bring you into a blue dream.

name: Sea Salt Soda
description: Let the summer sea breeze cool down your body.

name: Wheat Chocolate
description: Kickstart your day with a combination of chocolate and wheat!

name: Strange Castle
description: They say strange things happen in the castle at night...

name: Winter Warmth
description: Do you want a mug of hot cocoa?

name: Fortunes and Blessings
description: Wishing you all the best every year!

name: Fluffy Clouds
description: Feel like you're soaring among the clouds.

name: Gilded Feathers
description: Immerse yourself in this luxurious royal ball.

name: Merrymaking Carnival
description: You're about to be treated to an exciting performance...!

name: Warm Nostalgia
description: Listening to grandpa's childhood stories in a cozy room...

name: Musical Pavilion
description: Teach someone the proper way to drink and they'll be the most respected guest at the banquet.

name: Sugar Rush
description: Surrounded by a sweet fragrance.

name: Simple Wooden Rack
description: An ordinary-looking wooden piece of furniture that can hold several potted plants.

name: Wooden Square Table
description: If you're bored, just lean over and doodle something.

name: Elegant Green Table
description: An endless supply of cookies... How wonderful that we can eat to our heart's desires!

name: Luxurious Desk
description: Look at the gold-plated tissue box on it! This is clearly an expensive desk.

name: Azure Carnival
description: The items on the table move of their own accord, almost as if they posses actual souls!

name: Diary of a Sailor
description: Everything on this table is beloved by the retired old captain.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Minty Sweet Dreams Table
description: Looks like the gnomes can be quite vain as well.

name: Luminescent Crystal Table
description: Under the everlasting rose is a secret no one knows about...

name: Teddy Wishing Station
description: Fortunately, the chimney is large enough for the Christmas teddy to climb out of!

name: Joyful Sandalwood Table
description: I'm such a busy bee! There are still so many couplets left for me to write!

name: Fantastic Dream Table
description: If only I could eat candy before bed.

name: Classy Desk
description: Someone told me that I could also become a master as long as I practice diligently!

name: Magic Club
description: Knowledge about performing constantly flows into the baby's mind.

name: Snowfield Express
description: Toot toot! You little one's daily treats will be delivered right on time!

name: Peach and Blossom Desk
description: No snacking on the peaches when practicing calligraphy!

name: Sweet Foodie Moment
description: Shhh, the bear is creating a sweet piece of art.

name: Tassel Cushion
description: It doesn't matter how the cushion looks, as long as it's comfortable.

name: Checkered Mat
description: This extremely eco-friendly piece is upcycled from an old curtain.

name: Fancy Square Carpet
description: Tiny bows make for intricate decorations at each of the carpet's corners.

name: Golden Silk Cushion
description: Modeled after the esteemed and highly-regarded paw pad, this is specially sewn and customized with golden thread.

name: Blue Striped Cushion
description: Made of expensive materials, it's so comfy to hug that you'll never want to let it go.

name: Blue-white Mat
description: A simple knitted carpet in a nautical style.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Fluffy Sweetheart Cushion
description: I want it to be fluffy! No, even fluffier than that!

name: Mesmerizing Cobweb
description: A super bouncy cobweb rug. Great to keep the mischievous you busy with.

name: Cozy Knitted Rug
description: With its fuzzy and soft texture, standing on this rug is very comfortable indeed!

name: Auspicious Fishes Cushion
description: Who said that I can't possess both cod and ingots? My confidence allows me to easily obtain both at once!

name: Fluffy Mat
description: Oh no, I don't want to get up after sitting down!

name: Rose Ballad
description: The roses growing on this mat will never wilt.

name: Marvel Night Mat
description: Thump, thump, thump! The show is about to begin!

name: Astral Apple Mat
description: Smells faintly of apples.

name: Among the Flowers
description: Surpisingy warm to sit on. Is the floor heated?

name: Candy Mat
description: Do you think there's any candy hidden beneath the mat?

name: Cozy Bed
description: Despite being a simple wooden bed, it bears the memories of growing up.

name: Classic Crib
description: No peeking at the diary on the bed!

name: Extravagant Chaise Lounge
description: It feels like you'll only get brilliantly opulent drams when sleeping on this couch.

name: Dreamscape Wonderland
description: Don't lose sight of Mr. Rabbit, or you'll get lost in the dreamscape!

name: Sailing Impression
description: Modified from a small abandoned ship, it is full of memories of sailing in the wide, open sea.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Cooling Elven Dreams
description: The wonderful combination of butterfly bows and lace makes this adorable beyond compare.

name: Butterfly Haunting
description: Luminescent butterflies are somehow all you ever dream about when you lay on this.

name: Cozy Wintry Dream
description: Once you wake up, you'll be surrounded by presents! What joy!

name: Agarwood Arhat Bed
description: Um... Dear, the lucky money you hid under your bed can be seen.

name: Space Walk Bed
description: I dreamed I was eating cotton candy!

name: Scented Dreams
description: Enjoy a good night's sleep while surrounded by a pleasant floral scent!

name: Dreamy Moment
description: Who hid candies under the blanket?

name: Sweet Dreams Sleigh
description: It's said that you'll dream of receiving lots of gifts if you sleep in Santa's sleigh!

name: Crescent Daybed
description: Lean back and rest here if you're tired.

name: Childhood Dream Bed
description: Come and take a nap here if you get tired from playing.

name: Dry Bottle
description: What can be grown in this bottle? There's not a single drop of water in here.

name: Novice Potted Plant
description: An extremely resilient plant that previously survived under a high-pressure faucet.

name: Loafer's Plant
description: Oh no, I forgot to water it! Good thing it's a cactus...

name: Brilliant Moments
description: Expensive furniture must be complemented with dazzling lights.

name: Rose Paradise
description: How miraculous... Roses are actually growing out of teacups!

name: Opalescent Coral Tree
description: An expensive but beautiful coral handcraft.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Murmuring Dusk Bellflowers
description: Silently they bloom, showcasing their vibrant beauty.

name: Eye of the Roses
description: What a pity... It's missing some dramatic lashes.

name: Reindeer Cactus
description: What should we do now that the cactus is shaped like antlers? I know—I'll draw a reindeer face on the flower pot!

name: Kumquat Spring
description: May you be surrounded by good luck and may all of your endeavors be successful.

name: Fantastic Snack Cover
description: No one will notice if I take one, right?

name: Royal Display
description: Which crown should be worn today? I can't decide...

name: House of Toys
description: Remember to put your toys away neatly.

name: Snowfall Crystal Ball
description: It's hard to stop staring at the snowflakes inside!

name: Rouge Pavilion
description: The Asiatic apple blossoms are as pink as rouge.

name: Hot Air Balloon Basket
description: Looks cute and can be used for storage too.

name: Sticky Note
description: Full of encrypted text and doodles that desperately require translation.

name: Ordinary Noticeboard
description: As children grow up, they gradually learn how to organize their notes.

name: Countryside Painting
description: I hope that I'll be as happy as the lamb in the painting every day.

name: Vintage Collection
description: These are but run-of-the-mill antiques.

name: Wonderland Emissary
description: The mischievous Chesire Cat will show up without warning and scare your presumptuous self.

name: Shallow Harvest
description: Emits the sounds of tinkling bells whenever a breeze blows past.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Rising Star's Talent Showcase
description: A pet personally fired these porcelain wares. How adorable!

name: Castle Illusion
description: Why do I feel like I've seen something like this in some other castle?

name: Melody of Chimes
description: A beautiful morning begins with the crisp ringing sounds of chimes.

name: Abundant Harvest
description: Don't touch it anymore, darling... It's just a painting.

name: Cloudy Storage Shelf
description: I'll put all my favorite toys up there.

name: Misty Rose
description: Bring the lantern along as it can help you to dispel the mist!

name: Colorful Hanging Decorations
description: It makes cheerful tinkling noises when the wind blows.

name: Snowy White Candy Cane
description: Can this slender candy cane really hold up all those heavy gifts?

name: Ink Orchid
description: No idea who the aritst is, but someone insisted on hanging it right here.

name: Reverie Wall Decor
description: Items placed on it tend to appear exeptionally vibrant!

name: Tiny Stationery Holder
description: This may be tiny but it holds a comprehensive variety of stationery.

name: Hydroponic Plants
description: These weeds that have been retrieved from a pond look rather adorable.

name: Slippin' Good Time
description: Sitting on it can cause an entire afternoon to pass in the blink of an eye.

name: Mini Clothes Stand
description: Somehow used to hold bath towels instead.

name: Snack Basket
description: Leave the tastiest one for last!

name: Elegant Stool
description: The lace on the back of the stool is handmade.

name: Mini Breakfast Machine
description: The fried egg on top of the machine looks quite delectable... Too bad it's just a toy.

name: Elegant Umbrella Rack
description: Simple but tasteful, this is favored by ladies and gentleman alike.

name: Gumi's Recommendation
description: Any dish by an outstanding chef is an exquisite one.

name: Treasured Fine Wine
description: In actuality, it's just sweet fruit juice disguised as fine wine.

name: Specially Yours
description: An elegant chair specifically made for a distinguished pet.

name: Miraculous Blessings
description: The glittering golden key seems like it'll bring about fantastical adventures.

name: Scarlet Queen
description: A mysterious chess piece that suddenly appeared out of thin air one day, emitting a magical aura.

name: Magic Teapot
description: Fills up with a random blend of black tea each and every day.

name: Cute Cat Ear Mirror
description: This small mirror with a bow tie affixed to it is beloved by many girls.

name: Reverie Lamp
description: A lamp that has grown out of the grass... So, is it an electrical device or a plant, I wonder?

name: Marvelous Mushroom Clock
description: It's hard to believe, but when I woke up, the chair turned into a mushroom!

name: Wonderland Invitation
description: Don't wander too close to it or you'll be sucked into the book!

name: Salted Fish Cushion
description: Don't worry! It only looks like a salted fish, it actually smells nice.

name: Splashing Memories
description: Bring every little bit of your vacation memories back with you!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Splashing Memories*
description: Bring every little bit of your vacation memories back with you!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Life Philosophy
description: Aww, chuck those thoughts aside... How about making some fries instead?
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Invigorating Summer
description: Summer is the perfect time to drink an icy-cold beverage!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Tranquil Jellyfish Lamp
description: I feel as though I can stare at the jellyfish for an entire day.

name: Consumption Trap
description: The naughty child secretly used Gumi's credit card.

name: Minty Breath
description: Don't worry, it can still blow hot air.

name: Sweet Temptation
description: Before you know it, your hand is already wrapped around the joystick.

name: Double Freshness
description: Although desserts are delicious to eat, don't forget to brush your teeth afterward!

name: Checkered Chair with Ribbon
description: Although it looks pretty... the decoration on the back feels a little scratchy.

name: Starry Surprise
description: Make a wish each time you pick up a star.

name: Rapid-Cool Kettle
description: Is it my imagination or does the water exude a faint smell of peppermint?

name: Baron's Fine Wine
description: This deep red color... and viscosity... Th-This is tomato juice!

name: Rascal's Chest
description: A beautiful locked chest. No one knows where the key is.

name: Scurrying Candle
description: Don't blink or it'll appear at your feet before you know it.

name: Crimson Cascade
description: Haha, relax, this is just sweet strawberry jam!

name: Nightly Phantom
description: Go on and dance with the impish rascal in the mirror.

name: Castle Chair
description: Even with these thick layers of cobweb, you can tell this used to be a dainty little chair.

name: Grave Secret
description: Don't people take their secrets to the grave?

name: Arboreal Porcelain Mug
description: The marshmallows contained within will smell even more fragrant once they're toasted!

name: Cozy Wintry Break
description: That was close! I would have fallen asleep if I sat just a tad longer!

name: Snow Kingdom Candy Train
description: Choo-choo! Candy train coming through!

name: Sparkling Christmas Tree
description: What dazzling lights! What glittering stars!

name: Assorted Candy Canes
description: What should you do if you're tired all the time? Well, try sucking on a mysteriously flavored candy cane to excite your tastebuds!

name: Hatty Candle
description: The extraordinary windproof hat will protect the candle's flame from being extinguished!

name: Christmas Nesting Dolls
description: Santa, why is there a snowman in your belly?

name: Exploding Firecrackers
description: You can't set fireworks off indoors, my baby! Oh, it's just a model? Never mind, then.

name: Kitty's Red Wine
description: Although it seems like it contains a high percentage of alcohol, it's actually just sweet rice wine.

name: Hard Work Pays Off
description: Start the new year right by hitting the books!

name: Elegant Incense Burner
description: Who says that you have to light up incense? Can't I just admire them while they're on display?

name: Ubiquitous Wealth
description: Plant a money tree seed and wealth will converge at your house from all directions!

name: Mouthwatering Sweet Potato
description: Freshly baked sweet potatoes! Are you sure you don't wish to have a bite?

name: Sandalwood Stool
description: Comes with a small cushion on it, so that whoever sits on it will feel warm and cozy.

name: Nostalgic Moment
description: It's been so many years since I last played this game! I know what I'm doing the rest of the day.

name: Reverie Swing
description: I think back on my carefree childhood when I swing on it.

name: Fantastic Tiny Train
description: Today's train is bound for the galaxy!

name: Sleep-Well Eyepatch
description: I feel sleepy after putting it on.

name: Gachapon Toy
description: What am I going to get next?

name: Starry Telescope
description: Which star is your favorite?

name: Cloudy Star Chair
description: I won't feel cold with the rainbow blanket!

name: Classic Doll Cabinet
description: It contains all of my pet's favorite toys!

name: Angelic Voice
description: I can hear a melodious voice. Who's singing right now?

name: Passage of Time
description: Time flies, so enjoy the moment and always be happy!

name: Soft Satin Chair
description: This is a very soft chair, no wonder it's so popular!

name: Angel's Letter
description: Um.. Did an angel send this letter?

name: Royal Swan Rocking Chair
description: My pet has almost outgrown this rocking chair!

name: Gilded Perpetual Calendar
description: The liveliest time of year has arrived once more in the blink of an eye.

name: Little Ghost Lamp
description: There might be a surprise when you turn it on!

name: Party Cannon
description: An amazing moment like this has to be properly celebrated!

name: Classic Doll
description: A baby's favorite stuffed toy. It looks very cute.

name: Cute Mini Trailer
description: Sit tight as we set off for the amusement park!

name: Ecstatic Mood
description: Drum along to the cheerful beat to create beautiful melodies!

name: Club Chair
description: Let me tell you a secret, this icon is actually a three-leaf clover!

name: Delicious Dessert Rack
description: The melting ice cream looks so sad. Let me take care of it!

name: Gingerbread Chair
description: Sit down on it gently.

name: Wishingful Gift Stocking
description: Hang it up at night and wake up to a stocking full of gifts!

name: Dreamy Candy House
description: The roof 9is icing, and the walls are made of cookies, but it's too pretty to eat!

name: Apple Fireplace
description: Emits a light fruit tree scent when lit.

name: Passionate Chocolate
description: So warm and enthusiastic even the marshmallow dolls are starting to melt!

name: Starfall Clock
description: The hour hand moves whenever a shooting star streaks by.

name: Rocking Deer
description: Rocks back and forth, lulling you to sleep...

name: Floral Fruit Platter
description: Fresh fruits that are almost too tempting to resist.

name: Rosewood Round Stool
description: The vivid red is a telltale sign of its many years.

name: Lotus Candlestick
description: Shines throughout the night without ever flickering out!

name: Melodious Pipa
description: Just a simple wave can make it sing a beautiful melody!

name: Peach Blossom Tea Cakes
description: A refreshingly sweet treat that pairs perfectly with tea.

name: Mootlit Reflections Sake
description: Simply delightful...! *hic*

name: Spherical Rolling Lantern
description: Toss it up and watch it balance like magic. Give it a push and it rolls along smoothly!

name: Multi-layered Dessert Rack
description: I once heard a certain child mention that they wanted to try eating one hundred layers of dessert.

name: Cone Microphone
description: No one will be able yo resist the temptation to sing.

name: Ice Cream Stool
description: Feels so cool tpo the touch when you sit on it! An absolute necessity during the summer!

name: Lollipop Candy Jar
description: Everyday, the child eagerly awaits the moment when they get to enjoy these lollipops!

name: Pinky Ice Cream Car
description: Look! It's the ice cream car!

name: Bear Cup
description: Gulp, gulp, gulp. Let me drink some water before we continue playing.

name: Bear Claw Machine
description: We've already agreed that this will be your last try.

name: Toy Guitar
description: After you switch it on, it'll automatically play a pop song.

name: Wooden Bookshelf
description: Some simple processing is all it takes to turn this superior wood into a bookshelf.

name: Pandora's Puzzle
description: An unremarkable tiny birdcage ornament that leaves you wondering all day about it.

name: Sea Breeze Daydream
description: This tiny pet has a huge dream: to sail the vast ocean.
series: Of Coconuts Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: White Love Sincerity
description: Did I place the mirror too high up? I can only see half of my face!

name: Shattered Eden
description: So this is where Eggy hid his apple core...

name: Wish Ornament
description: It's said that wishes won't come true if they're spotted by others. Therefore, this message has been encrypted using pet language!

name: A Branch of Spring
description: Who made such exquisite and dainty paper-cut decorations? Turns out it's none other than our lil' craftsman!

name: Planet Window
description: I think I saw something sparkle over there.

name: Swan Painting
description: Can my pet also create such beautiful art if they practice for a few more decades?

name: Theater Clock
description: Yay! It's time for another fun gaming session!

name: Warm Winter Wreath
description: A must-have Christmas decoration! Don't forget to kiss your darling under it!

name: Spring at the Window
description: Spring's first whispers are emerging from beneath the snow.

name: Blue and Pink Streamers
description: Provides the wall with an extra hint of cuteness.

name: Green and Orange Streamers
description: Makes the wall look a little more colorful.
